definitions: 副产品；副产物；附带产生的结果

examples.text: Ancient fermented beverages had relatively low alcohol content. At about 13% alcohol, the by-products wild yeasts generate during fermentation become toxic and kill them. When the yeasts die,
examples.explanation: 这里的 by-products 指野生酵母在发酵过程中产生的“副产物”。这些物质在酒精浓度达到约 13% 时会变得有毒，并杀死酵母。

source.text: A brief history of alcohol - Rod Phillips
